race.description: Aviso Tas Pink Cup Day – May 24 (Bm64) Hcp
race.comment: Looks a good race for ZUNI (11) who is bursting to break through. Has finished runner-up both starts this time in, the latest a near miss on the synthetic last time. Plummets in the weights after the claim and expected to go close. ANTHEIA (7) ran on hard to score last time in a Class 2 at Launceston. Has a strong strike-rate this course and distance though and can make it back to back wins. GOLDEN MEADOW (2) was safely held over 1400m last time but worth noting all six career wins have been over the 1200m trip. Comes back in journey and well worth another chance. SANDUAL (4) was a 1400m winner two back then fifth over the same journey last time. Comes back in trip and although this slightly short of best will sit back and punch late. HALEN (5) has form much better than it looks. Well placed here and will be tough to stop fresh. GEEGEES DOWNPOUR (8) wasn't far away latest and looks a leading chance with the soft run.
